title: pseudolysimachion barrelieri subsp. andrasovszkyi
intro: Pseudolysimachion barrelieri subsp. andrasovszkyi is a subspecies of the Pseudolysimachion barrelieri, a type of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is commonly known as Andrássy's winter-cress or Hungarian wintercress. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for digestive issues and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Pseudolysimachion barrelieri subsp. andrasovszkyi include reducing inflammation and improving overall well-being, and it can be prepared as a herbal tea or supplement.
